info.title: IT Support Knowledge Base API
info.description: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) API for IT support queries. Searches knowledge base and returns grounded answers with confidence scores.

post.description: Searches the IT support knowledge base using semantic search and returns a grounded answer with confidence score and source citations. Use this for questions about passwords, VPN, billing, software installation, email, calendar, account access, or any IT support topic.

question.description: The IT support question to search for. Can be in natural language.
question.example: How do I reset my password?

200.description: Successful response with answer and metadata

answer.description: The generated answer based on knowledge base content

confidence.description: Confidence score from 0.0 to 1.0 indicating answer quality. ≥0.6 is reliable.

sources.description: Knowledge base documents used to generate the answer

value.answer:
To reset your password:
1. Go to https://portal.example.com/reset
2. Enter your email address
3. Click 'Send Reset Link'
4. Check your email for the reset link (expires in 1 hour)
5. Create a new password (min 12 characters, uppercase, lowercase, number, symbol)

400.description: Bad request - missing or invalid question parameter

function_key.name: x-functions-key
function_key.description: Azure Function API key for authentication
